validate.notes: Fixed two issues: (1) test.sh didn't write reward file - added explicit reward writing based on pytest exit code, (2) test_no_unwrap_or_panic was checking entire collapsible_if.rs for .unwrap() calls, but this file has existing unwraps from base commit that weren't modified by the fix. Changed test to only check preview.rs for new unsafe patterns. All 4 validation checks pass: Docker build OK, NOP test reward=0 (3 fail-to-pass tests fail as expected), Gold test reward=1 (all 10 tests pass), Rubric judge ICR=1.0.
